/usr/bin/arm-none-eabi-gcc  -DSTM32F446xx -mcpu=cortex-m4 -mthumb -mfpu=fpv4-sp-d16 -mfloat-abi=hard -Wall -Wextra -Werror -Wno-unused-parameter -O3 -mcpu=cortex-m4 -mthumb -mfpu=fpv4-sp-d16 -mfloat-abi=hard -T/home/norber04/MatrixMCU/projects/simone/../../ld/stm32f446re.ld -specs=nano.specs -lc -lm -Wl,-Map=project.map,--cref -Wl,--gc-sections -Wl,--print-memory-usage -Wl,--no-warn-rwx-segment -specs=rdimon.specs -lrdimon CMakeFiles/main.dir/main.c.obj CMakeFiles/main.dir/port/stm32f4/src/interr.c.obj -o /home/norber04/MatrixMCU/projects/simone/bin/stm32f446re/Release/main.elf  libproject-common.a libproject-port.a libfsm.a libproject-common.a libfsm.a
